raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current priorities","name":"What's been most on your mind in the last stretch of work, Sarah?","description":"Lets Sarah set the context before the feedback gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact story","name":"What outcome from your recent work do you think mattered most to the business?","description":"Surfaces how she frames impact beyond task completion.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder signal","name":"Where did your recent work get the clearest traction with stakeholders?","description":"Tests whether she can point to concrete moments of influence and visibility.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where do you think your work is still relying too much on people noticing it after the fact?","description":"Probes the risk of execution outpacing stakeholder awareness.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team friction","name":"Where has cross-functional friction been costing you the most time?","description":"Gets specific about boundary pain and rework loops.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Signal driver","name":"What's making it harder to raise your signal with stakeholders right now?","description":"Surfaces whether the constraint is habit, context, or channel choice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence habit","name":"What part of stakeholder influence feels least natural in your current style?","description":"Tests self-awareness about the behavioural shift needed at Senior level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback plan","name":"What would you change in the next month to make your impact more visible?","description":"Forces a concrete behaviour change rather than a vague intention.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment move","name":"What's the first concrete move you want to make on cross-team alignment before we next meet?","description":"Ends on a specific action tied to friction reduction and follow-through.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
